name: Sensō: Battle for Japan
description: Sensō: Battle for Japan is a Sengoku-era area-control wargame in which rival daimyō clans muster samurai armies, claim provinces across the Japanese archipelago, and clash for shogunal supremacy. Card-driven actions blend troop movement, alliance brokering, and battlefield resolution; brief games punctuated by dramatic decisive battles. For players who like their strategy edged with steel.
